title: AN ACT CREATING A NEW DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE THIRD LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
118 OG No. 4, 494 (January 24, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11612, December 10, 2021 ]

AN ACT CREATING A NEW DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE THIRD LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Department of Public Works and Highways, an additional district engineering office for the Third Legislative District of the Province of Zamboanga del Norte. It shall be known as the Fourth District Engineering Office and shall be located in the Municipality of Siocon, Province of Zamboanga del Norte.

SEC. 2. The Fourth District Engineering Office shall serve the municipalities of Baliguian, Siraway, Siocon, and Sibuco, all within the Third Legislative District of the Province of Zamboanga del Norte.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall include in the Departmentâs program the operationalization of the Fourth District Engineering Office in the Province of Zamboanga del Norte, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on March 3, 2020 and September 13, 2021, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 10 2021

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
